Home / Services / Wellness Care

Wellness Care

Maintenance care to keep your nervous system functioning at its best.

Just as Boulder residents maintain their bikes and hiking gear, regular chiropractic wellness care helps keep your body performing optimally. Our wellness patients schedule periodic adjustments to maintain spinal health, much like dental cleanings prevent cavities.

This proactive approach is popular among Boulder's health-conscious community. We focus on detecting small issues before they become problems, helping you avoid pain and maintain your active lifestyle. Whether you're training for the Bolder Boulder or just want to garden without back strain, wellness care can help you feel your best at every age.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Regular spinal and postural check-ups
  2. 02 Step 2: Gentle adjustments to correct minor misalignments
  3. 03 Step 3: Lifestyle and ergonomic recommendations
  4. 04 Step 4: Personalized maintenance schedule

Benefits

  • Maintains joint mobility
  • Supports nervous system function
  • Enhances overall wellbeing
  • Helps prevent degenerative changes

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I get wellness adjustments?

Frequency varies by individual, but most Boulder wellness patients visit every 4-6 weeks.

Is wellness care covered by insurance?

Some plans cover maintenance care, though many patients choose affordable cash plans for wellness visits.

Can chiropractic care boost immunity?

Research suggests proper spinal alignment supports immune function by reducing stress on the nervous system.

Book an Appointment

Ready to get started with wellness care? Contact us today.

Schedule Now Or call: 555-chi-r90
